title: Chat
disclaimer: This is AI — not a doctor. Ask your doctor about medicines.
emptyState: Have a question? Ask about sugar, BP, or food.
rateLimit: You've chatted 3 times today — ask again tomorrow 🙂
safetyRejected: It's best to ask your doctor this question.
offlineSend: Your message will be sent when you're back online.
offlineBanner: Offline — chat needs an internet connection.
emergencySkip: Handle the critical alert first. Call your doctor now.
flagConfirm: You've flagged this message. We'll review it. Thank you 🙏
typingTimeout: AI is taking a while — please try again
loadError: Chat failed to load. Please try again.
